retry_reason: refcount_inc is unconditional and always succeeds; retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: Increments the reference count of a `struct btrfs_block_group` via `refcount_inc`. This is a pure get wrapper — it unconditionally acquires an additional reference. The caller must ensure that the block group is alive (refcount > 0) before calling. The acquired reference must eventually be released by calling `btrfs_put_block_group` (or equivalent) when the reference is no longer needed. The operation is atomic and does not require external locking. There is no error path; the function always succeeds.

judge.reason: The function consists solely of an unconditional `refcount_inc` call, with no other logic. Its sole purpose is reference-count acquisition.
